steph-custom-recipes.name: Crockpot Herb Butter Chicken & Wild Rice
steph-custom-recipes.desc: Half Baked Harvest · Serves 6 · 643 cal/serving · 6hr crockpot
steph-custom-recipes.body:
Ingredients

  • 2 lbs chicken thighs or breasts
  • 1 cup wild rice
  • 1 onion, diced
  • 2 carrots, sliced
  • 2 cups mushrooms, sliced
  • 2 stalks celery, sliced
  • 1 tbsp dried parsley
  • 2 tbsp olive oil (divided)
  • 3 cups chicken broth
  • 1 tsp dried thyme
  • 1 tsp dried rosemary
  • 1 tsp paprika
  • Pinch cayenne
  • 1 head garlic cloves, smashed
  • 4 tbsp butter
  • Fresh sage leaves
  • Salt & pepper
  • Parmesan rind (optional)

Instructions

  1. In crockpot, combine wild rice, onion, carrots, mushrooms, celery, dried parsley. Season with salt & pepper. Add 1 tbsp olive oil, toss. Pour over chicken broth.
  2. Toss chicken with 1 tbsp olive oil, thyme, rosemary, paprika, cayenne, salt & pepper. Place in crockpot. Add garlic and parmesan rind if using.
  3. Cover and cook on LOW 5–6 hours or HIGH 2–3 hours.
  4. Before serving, preheat broiler. Remove chicken and garlic, place on baking sheet. Arrange butter and sage around chicken. Broil 1–3 min until crisp.
  5. Peel garlic, chop and mix into butter on pan. Toss chicken in butter.
  6. Fluff rice, serve chicken over rice and veggies. Drizzle remaining butter over top.

Nutrition (per serving)

643 cal · 45g protein · 45g carbs · 28g fat · 4g fibre · 4g sugar

holidays.text: 🐣 Easter Long Weekend — Good Friday Apr 3 → Easter Monday Apr 6, 2026

meals.name: Greek Yogurt Parfait
meals.desc: Liberté 11% (¾ cup) + raspberries (½ cup) + Carbonaut granola (⅓ cup) + hemp hearts (1 tbsp). Quick, protein-packed, no cooking needed.

meals.name: HBH Chicken Caesar Kale Salad
meals.desc: Massaged kale + chopped romaine + shredded rotisserie chicken (1 cup) + parmesan + croutons + Caesar dressing. Inspired by Half Baked Harvest.

meals.name: Cottage Cheese + Cucumber
meals.desc: ½ cup 2% cottage cheese + sliced cucumber + everything bagel seasoning. Light but filling, solid afternoon protein.

meals.name: HBH Crockpot Herb Butter Chicken & Wild Rice
meals.desc: Chicken slow-cooked with wild rice, mushrooms, carrots, celery, garlic & fresh herbs. Finished under broiler with butter and sage. Set it in the morning, done by dinner.

meals.name: Dark Chocolate & Almonds
meals.desc: 2 squares 70%+ dark chocolate + small handful almonds. Evening treat that keeps sugar low.

days.totals: ~1,740 cal · 130g protein · 113g carbs · 73g fat · 19g fibre · 25g sugar

meals.name: Brunch with Babs Cottage Cheese Pancakes
meals.desc: Blended cottage cheese + oats + banana + egg whites. High protein, fluffy, no whole eggs. Top with fresh berries and a light drizzle of maple syrup.

meals.name: Turkey & Avocado Wrap
meals.desc: Deli turkey (100g) + ½ avocado + baby spinach + shredded mozzarella + Dijon in a whole wheat tortilla.

meals.name: Protein Shake + Berries
meals.desc: 1 scoop vanilla protein powder + 1 cup unsweetened almond milk + ½ cup frozen mixed berries, blended.

meals.name: HBH Sheet Pan Chicken Fajitas
meals.desc: Sliced chicken breast (6oz) with fajita spices + bell peppers + onion, all on one pan. Serve in whole wheat tortillas with Greek yogurt, avocado, and salsa. Rush-approved!

meals.name: Apple + Almond Butter
meals.desc: 1 medium apple sliced + 1.5 tbsp almond butter.

days.totals: ~1,790 cal · 137g protein · 150g carbs · 56g fat · 28g fibre · 47g sugar

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with PB & Banana
meals.desc: Liberté 11% (¾ cup) + ½ sliced banana + 1 tbsp natural peanut butter + hemp hearts (1 tbsp) + Carbonaut granola (¼ cup).

meals.name: HBH White Bean & Kale Soup
meals.desc: Warming white bean soup with kale, diced tomatoes, garlic & Italian seasoning. One pot, 30 min. Serve with 1 slice sourdough. Perfect cozy Friday lunch.

meals.name: Cottage Cheese + Sliced Peach
meals.desc: ½ cup 2% cottage cheese + ½ cup sliced peach (fresh or thawed frozen) + cinnamon. Hits protein without blowing sugar.

meals.name: Brunch with Babs Chicken Shawarma Rice Bowls
meals.desc: Marinated chicken thighs (yogurt, lemon, cumin, paprika, garlic) pan-seared or baked. Over basmati rice with cucumber, tomato, red onion, garlic yogurt drizzle. Flavourful and family-friendly.

meals.name: Dark Chocolate & Walnuts
meals.desc: 2 squares 70%+ dark chocolate + small handful walnuts.
